HGSS.540.0000:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Lyra is upstairs.\f
She’s playing games with her Pokémon
as usual.\f
You didn’t bring your...Pokémon?
...Oh, I should’ve known.\f
You don’t have your own Pokémon yet.\f
Well, I hope I didn’t hurt your
feelings, [0103,0000,0000].
HGSS.540.0001:

Ethan is upstairs.\f
He’s having fun with his Pokémon
as usual.\f
You didn’t bring your...Pokémon?
...Oh, I should’ve known.\f
You don’t have your own Pokémon yet.\f
Well, I hope I didn’t hurt your
feelings, [0103,0000,0000].
HGSS.540.0002:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
Lyra is not here.\f
She’s been keeping herself busy
helping the professor.\r
She’s busier than I am!
